name: Barun
flavor: Wanders the void between ideas, building what shouldn't exist.
bio: Dwells at the intersection of design and AI — mapping invisible systems, forging clarity from chaos. Known for pulling insight from the darkest corners of any problem and making the whole room see what wasn't there before.

moves.name: Bankai: Star Forge
moves.description: Unleashes full focus — collapses scattered signals into a constellation of clarity no one else could map.
